Agent Reference Guide

Miscellaneous Order
Cancellations

Effective Feb 17 · Agents now process misc order C&Rs
What Changed

As of February 17, agents are responsible for processing applicable Miscellaneous Order cancellations and refunds, including Annual Report + SFB orders.

How to Handle Cancellations & Refunds
1

Find the right guidelines

Navigate to the product or service type you are cancelling within the Cancellation & Refund Guidelines article.

2

Check the General Rules section

Always observe the General Rules section to determine eligibility before taking any action. All miscellaneous products and services have a dedicated Rules section.

3

Follow all outlined steps exactly

Do not assume all order types have the same guidelines. Always refer to the published processes when in doubt.
